title: Pleurothallis neorinkei
intro: Pleurothallis neorinkei is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pleurothallis neorinkei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Pleurothallis neorinkei is a species of orchid in the genus Pleurothallis. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a type of terrestrial orchid.
